title: AmbientSounds: Remastered Sounds Pack
description: Brings realistic and beautiful ambience into Minecraft!, as a resource pack port of AmbientSounds5 mod!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b80f273c0ab20ddc633477d43414259d3d9c6e90.png)
___________________________________________________________________________________
**📖About**
- 🌸 Ambient Sounds is all about sounds effects, aims to remove the "silence" of Minecraft by just adding ambients sounds into the game
- 🚨 This sounds pack is an unofficial fork of CreativeMD's "AmbientSounds" mod, but i convert it into a fully customizable sounds resources pack.
__________________________________________________________________________________
**✅ Features** «
- Biome dependent ambient sounds such as Jungle, Forest, Ocean, Beach, Desert, Deep-dark Cave&Cliffs ect...
- Unique entity ambient sounds depends on where they naturally spawn..
- Unique and realistic weather sounds effects such as rain, thunder, storm, wind ect....
- Enhance overall Minecraft's soundscapes.

___________________________

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9Ia1ghx1V3c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_______________________________________________________________________
**🤝Relations:** «
📝BY FOLLOWING THE GNU LISENCES
- AmbientSound5 By CreativeMD
_________________________________________________________________

**NOTES📌** «
- Don't spawning too many mobs around you (ALOT of annoying sounds)
- Best experience with headphones🎧
- The ambient sounds does not works like any mods. it's only alter Minecraft's original sounds! 
- This pack only for player who enjoying sounds while playing the game.
- This pack is a share for those who love nature sounds and enjoying it, by not rushing too much!
_________________________________________________

**❓ F.A.Q.** «
- **_Why are there so many layering (wierd sounds)?_**
- Since this is a sound pack, there are quite a few limitations on how it works, so it may not be suitable for some users
- **_Does it works like original mod ?_**
- This is just a sound-resource pack, i did the best i could.
- **_May i Re-upload this project?_**
- DO NOT repost this sounds pack at any other sites.
- _**How can i customize this sounds pack?**_
- IF you want to customize the sounds pack, you can access the ''sounds.json'' to config your self, files:sounds->"AmbientSounds" file that including everything you can refer to customize yourself, i recommended using Audacity for sounds editing.
- **_Bugs&Error Reports👾_**
- Contact me on discord: lanixius if you have any question
- _**I dont hear any sounds❓**_
- Make sure this pack on the top of your texture packs section, also check your volume for sure.
- _**Version compatible?**_
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.13 to the lasted version, and will not work in snapshots versions.
- _**This sounds pack is not working for me**_
- It may conflict with some sounds mods you better check your files.
- _**Can i use this pack on my modpack, server ect...?**_
- Yes you can, considering credit me and the mod's Authors
- _**Does it work on Fabric Forge, or other Minecraft's cilent?**_
- This pack compatible with any Minecraft cilent.
- **_Too many layering sounds_**
- Then type: /stopsounds @a

___________________________________________

⚠ **Please READ** ⚠ «
- This sounds pack currently available on Curseforge, Planet MC, Modrinth✅. 
- All the assets under this pack are flollowing GNU lisence. So there is NO stolen assets✅.
__________________________________________

**Have Fun 📟!** «
